packages.name: aria-args
packages.description: CLI argument parsing for Aria — reads /proc/self/cmdline and provides flag/value query functions

packages.name: aria-ascii
packages.description: ASCII character classification and conversion: is_upper/lower/digit/hex, to_lower/upper, digit_val, hex_val

packages.name: aria-audio
packages.description: Software audio synthesis for Aria virtual console — 4-channel mixing, waveform generation via C shim

packages.name: aria-bits
packages.description: Bit manipulation utilities for uint64: test/set/clear/flip, nibble extraction, byte popcount

packages.name: aria-buf
packages.description: Byte and word packing/unpacking operations for uint64 buffers (little-endian)

packages.name: aria-clamp
packages.description: Min, max, clamp, abs, and sign for int64 and uint64

packages.name: aria-color
packages.description: RGBA color packing, unpacking, and pixel transforms for Aria

packages.name: aria-console
packages.description: Virtual 8-bit console address map and frame scheduler — 16-bit memory-mapped address space, pure Aria

packages.name: aria-conv
packages.description: Saturating numeric narrowing and float/int conversion utilities

packages.name: aria-decision-t
packages.description: DecisionGradientT — two-axis gradient decision construct with time-axis snapshot history

packages.name: aria-display
packages.description: Cross-platform terminal display library — ANSI/termios TUI primitives, cursor control, raw mode via C shim

packages.name: aria-endian
packages.description: Byte-swap and rotation utilities — endian conversion, circular bit shifts on uint64

packages.name: aria-entangled
packages.description: EntangledPair — two coupled DecisionGradients with tilt-axis propagation and joint crystallization

packages.name: aria-fixed
packages.description: Q32.32 fixed-point arithmetic on uint64: from_int, to_int, frac_bits, add, sub, mul, half, double, gt, eq

packages.name: aria-freq
packages.description: Frequency/period integer arithmetic: hz_to_ns, ns_to_hz, mhz/hz conversions, baud timing, ms/ns conversions

packages.name: aria-gradient-field
packages.description: GradientField — spatial decision field driven by a single DGT emitter (LIB-27)

packages.name: aria-hash
packages.description: Non-cryptographic hash functions — FNV-1a, djb2, bit-mixing for hash tables, checksums, and seeding

packages.name: aria-input
packages.description: Raw keyboard input for Aria virtual console — key detection with SNES-style button mapping via C shim

packages.name: aria-json
packages.description: JSON tokeniser for Aria — byte-level scanning with malloc/free for zero-copy token-type arrays

packages.name: aria-math
packages.description: Mathematical functions for Aria — trig, exponential, logarithm, rounding, and more via C libm

packages.name: aria-mux
packages.description: Bit-select, field insert/extract, conditional mux, mask operations, and blend for register-map and FSM patterns

packages.name: aria-rand
packages.description: xorshift64 pseudo-random number generator for Aria

packages.name: aria-resource-mem
packages.description: Consumable expiring memory cells — configurable read/write/TTL limits with Result-style access

packages.name: aria-str
packages.description: High-level string manipulation library for Aria

packages.name: aria-uuid
packages.description: 128-bit UUID arithmetic utilities — pack/unpack, hi/lo split, comparison, and version extraction

packages.name: aria-vec
packages.description: 2D and 3D float64 vector math: dot, cross, and length-squared operations

packages.name: aria-zigzag
packages.description: Zigzag encoding/decoding — maps signed integers to unsigned for efficient varint serialization
